Off Calendar Mar-16-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege a viable cause of action. Trial is continued to September 28, 2020. Judge Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Continued To Mar-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Paul O'Grady, 415-756-5501, Plaintiff in Pro Per.

Ryan Steven, Esq., 415-554-3975, appearing for City and County of San Francisco, for Defendant and moving party.

Hearing held. Paul requested that this matter be continued to be allowed to file an opposition to the demurrer. Mr. Steven stated that he would like the motion to be heard today.

The Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT and trial date is continued to March 16, 2020. Judge Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Amended Notice Of Defendant City And County Of San Francisco Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jan-17-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Amended Notice Of Defendant City And County Of San Francisco Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is GRANTED. As to the cause of action for inverse condemnation motion is granted with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege what property belonging Plaintiff was taking. Motion is granted with leave to amend as to all other causes of action to allege in good faith statutory basis for liability against a public entity. Order for the same signed prior to calendar being called. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
